summary: Completed testing of Gold price fix and TMO Tenders UI redesign. All backend APIs (11/11) and frontend features passed. Gold price now shows ~$4400 (fixed from $4). TMO Tenders UI matches the new format with PIR GRAIN & PULSES header, PORT/COMPANY/QUANTITY/CIF/EXW columns, red CIF text, and TOTAL row.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/market/prices returns all 9 commodities/currencies
Backend: Gold price is in correct range (~$4400, not $4)
Backend: All commodities have isLive=true and source=Barchart
Backend: Price data has all required fields (symbol, price, change, changePercent, timestamp, name, type, unit)
Backend: POST /api/market/tenders creates tender with new fields
Backend: POST /api/market/tenders/{id}/results adds result with port, company, quantity, cifPrice, exwPrice
Backend: Result with partial prices (only CIF, no EXW) works correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/market/tenders/{id} deletes tender
Backend: GET /api/market/tenders returns all tenders
Backend: Tender endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Prices endpoint requires authentication
Frontend: Gold price shows $4,399.2 in Live Market Prices table
Frontend: All commodities have green 'Live' badges
Frontend: TMO Tenders tab shows 'PIR GRAIN & PULSES' header
Frontend: Tender info row shows date, commodity, shipment period
Frontend: Table columns: PORT, COMPANY, QUANTITY, CIF (red), EXW
Frontend: CIF values displayed in red text
Frontend: EXW values displayed with $ prefix
Frontend: Quantity displayed in European format (25.000 = 25,000 MT)
Frontend: TOTAL row shows sum of quantities
Frontend: New Tender dialog has all fields (date, commodity, shipment start/end, status)
Frontend: Add Result dialog has all fields (port, company, quantity KMT, CIF price, EXW price)
Frontend: Delete tender button works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: market_data.py: Gold price fix correctly handles comma-separated numbers (e.g., '4,408.0') using regex that captures full string and strips commas
market_data.py: TMOTenderResult model updated with new fields (port, company, quantity, cifPrice, exwPrice)
MarketDataPage.js: Backward compatibility maintained - checks for result.company || result.winner for old data
MarketDataPage.js: Quantity displayed as (quantity * 1000).toLocaleString('de-DE') for European format
MarketDataPage.js: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test tenders via API and UI during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gold price scraping fix verified - regex now handles comma-separated numbers like '4,408.0'. TMO Tenders UI redesigned with new format: PIR GRAIN & PULSES header, PORT/COMPANY/QUANTITY/CIF/EXW columns. Backend model TMOTenderResult uses new fields (port, company, quantity, cifPrice, exwPrice). Old data with winner/sizeKMT fields handled via backward compatibility in frontend.

gold_price_fix.issue: Gold price was showing $4 instead of ~$4400
gold_price_fix.fix: Regex updated to handle comma-separated numbers in Barchart HTML

tmo_tenders_ui.add_result_dialog: Port, Company, Quantity (KMT), CIF Price, EXW Price

features_verified.live_badges: All 9 commodities/currencies show green 'Live' badge with Barchart source
